case_title: MANUEL RAMIREZ PEREZ VS. LAMELL STEPHEN RANDOLPH JR.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED AT WINDOW
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ PEREZ, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT LAMELL JR., STEPHEN RANDOLPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF TRUE NAME FILED BY DEFENDANT LAMELL JR., STEPHEN RANDOLPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-30-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MANUEL RAMIREZ PEREZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINASIA. DEFENDANT STEPHEN R. LAMELL IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE AAA ESTIMATE IS APPROPRIATE AND CONTINUES THIS MATTER TO ENSURE $4349.35 PAYMENT TO THE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCES IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPT-30TH HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: SLYVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ PEREZ, MANUEL
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ PEREZ, MANUEL
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
